name: pyright-autoconfig
description: SessionStart hook that drops a personal, locally-git-ignored pyrightconfig.json into any Python project that lacks a Pyright config -- points Pyright at the uv .venv so imports resolve (real cross-file type intel) and silences the reportMissingImports flood. Idempotent; no-op outside Python projects; never clobbers an existing pyright config; never commits the file.
